name: Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a mixing bowl.
2. Add sugar, vanilla extract, and eggs to the melted margarine. Mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the cocoa powder and flour.
4. If desired, fold in chopped walnuts or peanut butter chips.
5. Grease an 9-inch X 13-inch pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
